final_answer: The action may not proceed. CLOSE-XOR-078 applies to batch X-79, not the target X-78. The deviation alert DEV-XOR-078 remains open for X-78. Policy STD-XOR-078-P mandates an exact match for batch, assay, criterion, and date. Until a closure specifically for X-78 is confirmed, the source boundary remains open, necessitating escalation.
